name: a-horde-o-bees
description: Claude Code plugins for agent discipline, workflow conventions, and project navigation. Add with no ref for dev channel (tracks main); add with `@vX.Y.Z` to pin to a stable release.

plugins.name: ocd
plugins.description: Deterministic enforcement of permissions, rules, and structural conventions with agent-facing project navigation

plugins.name: skill-authoring
plugins.description: Two companion skills for authoring new skills: skill-composer composes from exemplar sources via goal-driven dialogue with drift tracking against pinned upstream commits; skill-creator creates from scratch via interview-driven dialogue layered on Anthropic's skill-creator. Both apply PFN, progressive-disclosure, description-authoring, and workflow-vs-script disciplines at every authoring moment.

plugins.name: composed-skills
plugins.description: Curated bundle of skills composed via skill-authoring:skill-composer. Each skill carries its own composition.md (design intent + pinned source provenance). Install the bundle via /plugin install, or pick individual skills via Vercel's npx skills.
